data.title: 2025 International Collegiate Programming Contest (ICPC) Asia Jakarta Regional Contest
data.description: Achieved Honorable Mention at the ICPC 2025 Jakarta Regional Contest, representing Gunadarma University against elite university teams from across Asia including Singapore, Taiwan, Vietnam, and Malaysia, after qualifying through the Indonesia National Contest (INC) 2025.
data.label: View Certificate

data.title: 2024 International Collegiate Programming Contest (ICPC) Asia Jakarta Regional Contest
data.description: Achieved Honorable Mention at the ICPC 2024 Jakarta Regional Contest, competing against elite university teams from across Asia including Singapore, Taiwan, Vietnam, Thailand, South Korea, and the Philippines, after qualifying through the Indonesia National Contest (INC) 2024.
data.label: View Certificate

data.title: 1st Place CodeFest 03 Competitive Programming
data.description: Won 1st Place at CodeFest 3.0, a university-level competitive programming competition organized by Gunadarma.io. Demonstrated strong algorithmic thinking and efficient problem-solving skills.

data.title: 2nd Place Technofair 12.0 Competitive Programming
data.description: Secured 2nd Place at Technofair 12.0, a university-level competitive programming competition. Showcased solid performance in data structures, algorithms, and logical reasoning in a highly competitive academic environment.

data.title: 2nd Place CodeFest 02 Competitive Programming
data.description: Awarded 2nd Place at CodeFest 02, a university-level competitive programming contest hosted by Gunadarma.io. Demonstrated consistent performance in solving complex algorithmic problems under time constraints.

data.title: 3rd Place Internet of Things Competition, KOMPRES 15
data.description: Achieved 3rd Place in the Internet of Things competition at KOMPRES 15, a university-level creativity and software development contest organized by the Informatics Laboratory, Universitas Gunadarma. Built an innovative IoT-based solution combining hardware and software integration.

data.title: Speaker: Miniclass Competitive Programming
data.description: Delivered a insightful lecture on Competitive Programming including problem-solving strategies, algorithmic thinking, and practical coding tips.
